CustomField.description: Identifies the date on which the rent invoice is to be generated, based on the defined "Invoice Required By" period relative to the Period Start Date.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: The Rent Invoice Generation Date is calculated by subtracting the "Invoice Required By" number of days from the Period Start Date. This date indicates when the billing team is expected to generate and issue the corresponding invoice to the customer.
CustomField.label: Rent Invoice Generation Date
